memories.name: auth-oauth2
memories.content: We use OAuth2 with PKCE flow via Auth0. Callback: /api/auth/callback. Scopes: openid, profile, email.

memories.name: auth-session
memories.content: Sessions stored in Redis with 24h TTL. Refresh tokens rotate on use. Secure cookie with SameSite=Strict.

memories.name: auth-rbac
memories.content: Three roles: viewer (read-only), editor (create/update), admin (full access). Roles stored in JWT claims.

memories.name: auth-bug-refresh
memories.content: Token refresh had race when multiple tabs open. Fixed with mutex. Do not use optimistic locking for tokens.

memories.name: auth-mfa
memories.content: MFA via TOTP (Google Authenticator). Planned for Q3. Backup codes stored hashed in user profile.

memories.name: deploy-prod
memories.content: Deploy target: staging-3. Use make deploy HOST=staging PORT=58080. Rolling updates with 2-pod minimum.

memories.name: deploy-rollback
memories.content: If deploy fails: 1) Check pod logs 2) Run make rollback 3) Notify #ops Slack channel 4) File incident.

memories.name: deploy-freeze
memories.content: Merge freeze starts 2026-05-01 for mobile release branch. No non-critical PRs after that date.

memories.name: deploy-canary
memories.content: 10% traffic to canary pod for 30 minutes. Auto-rollback if error rate exceeds 1% or p99 latency > 500ms.

memories.name: deploy-secrets
memories.content: Secrets in Vault. Reference via VAULT_ADDR. Never commit secrets to git. Rotate quarterly.

memories.name: db-sessions-schema
memories.content: Sessions: id UUID PK, user_id UUID FK, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, metadata JSONB. Index on user_id, created_at.

memories.name: db-migration-v2
memories.content: Migration 0042: add value_score FLOAT DEFAULT 0.5, access_count INT DEFAULT 0, entities TEXT[].

memories.name: db-perf-queries
memories.content: Use EXPLAIN ANALYZE before adding indexes. The sessions join was slow because of missing index on metadata->>'type'.

memories.name: db-backup
memories.content: Daily pg_dump at 03:00 UTC. Retained 30 days. Monthly snapshot to S3 Glacier. Test restore quarterly.

memories.name: db-connection-pool
memories.content: Max connections: 25. Idle timeout: 5 minutes. Use pgbouncer in transaction mode for connection pooling.

memories.name: api-endpoints
memories.content: GET /api/health, POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/memories, POST /api/memories/search, DELETE /api/memories/:id.

memories.name: api-rate-limit
memories.content: Rate limit: 100 req/min per user. Burst: 20. Token bucket algorithm. Redis-backed sliding window.

memories.name: api-versioning
memories.content: URL-based versioning: /api/v1/, /api/v2/. Breaking changes require new version. Old versions supported 12 months.

memories.name: api-error-format
memories.content: Errors must include code, message, and request_id. Never expose stack traces in production. Use RFC 7807.

memories.name: api-pagination
memories.content: Cursor-based pagination for lists. Use opaque cursor tokens. Default page size 50, max 200.

memories.name: memory-architecture
memories.content: L1 working (context window), L2 episodic (JSONL), L3 compaction (summaries), L4 procedural (AGENTS.md), L5 persistent (markdown+YAML).

memories.name: memory-scoring
memories.content: Score = 0.5*semantic + 0.3*recency + 0.2*importance. Recency: exponential decay, 30-day half-life.

memories.name: memory-search
memories.content: Four backends: keyword (BM25-like), Bleve FTS, chromem-go vectors, entity linking. Fused via RRF k=60.

memories.name: memory-consolidation
memories.content: Dreamer runs every 30 minutes. Prunes stale memories, decays values, merges duplicates by Jaccard > 0.5.

memories.name: memory-persona
memories.content: Persona tracks 5 dimensions: knowledge domains, communication style, behavior, interactions, session context.

memories.name: testing-tdd
memories.content: Always write tests first. Integration tests must hit real database, not mocks. Got burned with mock divergence.

memories.name: testing-coverage
memories.content: Minimum 80% line coverage for new packages. Critical paths (auth, payment) require 95%. Use go test -cover.

memories.name: testing-fixtures
memories.content: Use t.TempDir() for test files. Embed fixtures via testdata/. Never write to working directory. Cleanup is automatic.

memories.name: testing-integration
memories.content: Integration tests use build tag: //go:build integration. Run with: go test -tags integration. Skip in CI fast lane.

memories.name: testing-flaky
memories.content: Flaky tests must be fixed within 48 hours or quarantined. Use t.Flaky() annotation. Never retry-loop in tests.

memories.name: infra-kubernetes
memories.content: GKE cluster: 3 nodes, n2-standard-4. Namespace per environment. Istio service mesh for mTLS.

memories.name: infra-monitoring
memories.content: Prometheus + Grafana. Alertmanager to PagerDuty. Key dashboards: api-latency, pod-health, memory-usage.

memories.name: infra-logging
memories.content: Structured JSON logs to stdout. Fluentd ships to Elasticsearch. Kibana for search. Retain 90 days.

memories.name: infra-cdn
memories.content: CloudFront for static assets. Cache TTL: 1 hour for API, 1 day for static. Invalidation via deploy script.

memories.name: infra-cost
memories.content: Monthly cloud spend: ~$4,200. Biggest items: GKE ($1,800), RDS ($900), CloudFront ($400). Target: reduce 15%.

memories.name: user-editor-vim
memories.content: Uses neovim with custom config. LSPs: Go (gopls), Rust (rust-analyzer), TypeScript. Prefers modal editing.

memories.name: user-timezone
memories.content: Pacific Time (UTC-7). Available 9am-6pm. Prefers async communication. Do not schedule before 10am.

memories.name: user-review-style
memories.content: Prefers concise PR descriptions. Dislikes excessive comments in code. Values clean git history (squash merges).

memories.name: ci-pipeline
memories.content: GitHub Actions. Jobs: lint, test, build, deploy-staging, deploy-prod. Deploy-prod requires manual approval.

memories.name: ci-caching
memories.content: Cache Go modules (~/.cache/go-mod). Cache build output (bin/). Key on go.sum hash. Saves ~3 min per build.

memories.name: perf-baseline
memories.content: API p50: 12ms, p99: 85ms. Memory recall p50: 3ms, p99: 25ms. Target: p99 < 100ms for all endpoints.

memories.name: perf-profiling
memories.content: Use go tool pprof for CPU/memory. Compile with -debug for symbols. Profile in staging, never production.

memories.name: security-audit
memories.content: Q1 audit: no critical findings. Medium: upgrade jwt-go to v5. Low: add CSP headers. Due by end of Q2.

memories.name: security-deps
memories.content: Only MIT, Apache-2.0, BSD, ISC, MPL-2.0 licenses allowed. Run license audit monthly. No GPL dependencies.

memories.name: team-onboarding
memories.content: 1) Clone repo 2) make init 3) Set API keys 4) make build 5) Read AGENTS.md. Takes ~30 minutes.

memories.name: team-standup
memories.content: Async standups in #engineering Slack at 10am PT. Format: yesterday/today/blockers. Keep under 3 sentences.

memories.name: old-deploy-staging2
memories.content: Deploy target: staging-2. Use make deploy HOST=staging-2. This config is no longer active.

memories.name: old-api-v1-only
memories.content: API only supports v1. No versioning needed. Single endpoint namespace.

memories.name: old-testing-mocks
memories.content: Use mocks for database in all tests. Fast and reliable. Mock all external dependencies.

memories.name: go-error-handling
memories.content: Wrap errors with fmt.Errorf and %w. Check errors immediately. Never use panic for control flow.

memories.name: go-concurrency
memories.content: Use errgroup for fan-out. Context for cancellation. Channel direction in signatures. No bare goroutines.

memories.name: go-logging
memories.content: Use slog structured logger. No log.Printf or fmt.Println for debugging. Log at Info for ops, Debug for dev.

memories.name: frontend-react
memories.content: React 19 with TypeScript. Vite for build. TanStack Query for data fetching. Tailwind CSS.

memories.name: frontend-testing
memories.content: Vitest for unit tests. Playwright for E2E. React Testing Library for components. No enzyme.

memories.name: incident-2026-03
memories.content: Root cause: connection pool exhaustion from leaked connections in error path. Fix: defer conn.Close() in all handlers. Duration: 45 min.

memories.name: incident-response
memories.content: 1) Acknowledge in PagerDuty 2) Join #incident Slack 3) Identify scope 4) Mitigate 5) Post-mortem within 48h.

queries.query: how to set up OAuth authentication
what is the API rate limit
how does authentication work end to end including session storage
what is the full deployment process including rollback and secrets
database performance: slow queries and connection pooling
memory system retrieval and scoring pipeline
testing strategy: TDD workflow with integration tests
API design: versioning, pagination, and error handling
security: dependency policy and audit findings
what is the current deployment target
current testing approach for database tests
what changed in the testing approach
how to train a neural network from scratch
